content.en:
"The deity talent, I have it now, just prepare another treasure. Ordinary Arcana is of little use, its potential is limited, at most it can raise the cultivation of the second deity to the realm of domination, and at the very least, it must be a top-level Arcana!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He now possessed some supreme treasures, the most mysterious and precious of which must be the Chaos Black Lotus.

However, using the Chaos Black Lotus as the second deity's body is a bit wasteful, and he may not be able to refine the Chaos Black Lotus.

Besides, the second deity is still useless in the future, and it cannot be transcended, and after he is detached, the second deity will be equivalent to a discarded thing.

Therefore, there was no need for him to waste the mysterious Chaos Black Lotus.

"In addition to the Chaos Black Lotus, the only top-level treasure I can use in my hand is a top-level treasure long knife, which is a long knife transformed from the companion treasure of the Silver Horn Ancestral God, this weapon is still useful to me for the time being, if it is used as a second deity embryo, it will be a bit wasteful. "

Ye Tiandao.

After pondering for a while, he was ready to exchange a top-level Arcana from the Terran higher-ups.

He was worth a lot of money, and he had many treasures, and the value of them together was far more than a top-level treasure, and it would not be a problem to exchange it for a treasure.

"The Flame Heavenly Venerable can forge a top-level treasure, and the Flame Heavenly Palace must have a top-level treasure, so it's better to find the Flame Heavenly Venerable to exchange for a top-level treasure!"

Ye Tian thought so.

So, he went to the Flame Heavenly Palace, and soon met the Flame Heavenly Venerable.

......

"Allah, rare guest, that rarely comes to me, could it be that my junior Ming Yue girl caused trouble?"

Agni Heavenly Venerable saw Ye Tian and said.

"How could the Bright Moon Fairy cause trouble, I'm here for something else this time?"

Ye Tiandao.

"What?"

Flame Heavenly Venerable asked.

"I want to buy a top-grade treasure from Flame Heavenly Venerable!" Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Buy a top-level supreme treasure?" Flame Tianzun was slightly surprised, "Ten Thousand Laws Allah, don't you have a top-level supreme treasure?" Although it can only be regarded as a pseudo-top-level supreme treasure, for you, it is no different from a top-level supreme treasure, so why buy another one?"

"Agni Heavenly Venerable, I have a lot of use, I wonder if Agni Heavenly Venerable can sell me a piece?"

Ye Tiandao.

"This ......" Agni Tianzun was a little embarrassed: "Wanfa Allah, you should know how scarce the top supreme treasure is in the human race, and it is difficult to find materials to create top supreme treasures, usually the top supreme treasures I have created are entrusted to me by the nine supreme level forces, for so many years, there are only a few top supreme treasures that really belong to me in the Agni Heavenly Palace, and each top supreme treasure is considered a treasure of the town palace, I don't know how many forces want to buy it, but they are all rejected by me." "

"Flame Heavenly Venerable, I wonder if this thing is useful to you?"

Ye Tian took out some strange water from the small universe in his body, this kind of water was obtained by Ye Tian in the ancient well of the world manor created by the Heavenly Monarch of the Abyss Abyss Yuntan, which could make a person's body fit with the power of the Chaos Dao.

Ye Tian had been using this strange water to temper his body before, so that his body could reach the most perfect level of fit with the Chaos Dao, and he could exert the power of the Chaos Dao to a terrifying level.

Although this strange water can't directly increase its strength, it can indirectly make its strength skyrocket, after all, the power of the Chaos Avenue can be brought into play stronger, which is an indirect increase in strength.

Thus, this strange water is of little use to the weak, but it is useful to the strong, especially for those who have been immersed in the avenue for a long time, it is definitely priceless.

"What is this?"

Flame Tianzun was a little curious, but he still took the strange water and touched it with his hand.

In an instant, strange energy poured into the body of the Flame Heavenly Venerable, refining the body of the Flame Celestial Venerable, making his body fit into the Chaos Dao.

However, he didn't notice anything unusual about his body at first.

Just when he was puzzled, Ye Tian's voice came.

"Fire Heavenly Venerable, mobilize the power of the Great Dao of Fire and give it a try. "

Ye Tian reminded.

"Good!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable tried to mobilize the power of the Chaos Dao, and his expression suddenly changed.

"How could it be !!"

He found that his Chaos Avenue fit a little, although only slightly, but he felt it.

"This is the water of the Great Dao!! you actually have the legendary water of the Great Dao!!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable was shocked.

"This thing is called the Water of the Great Dao?"

Ye Tian knew the name of this strange water for the first time, and he was also quite curious.

"Yes, this should be the legendary water of the Great Dao, it is rumored that the water of the Great Dao is a kind of water drawn from the Great Dao to a level of understanding of the Great Dao, this kind of water in your hand should be the diluted water of the Great Dao, it is rumored that a drop of the real Great Dao Water is enough for a person to have the Great Dao physique, which perfectly fits the power of the Great Dao, if there is enough water of the Great Dao, it can even condense the Holy Body of the Great Dao. Our human race once got a book of inheritance, and the water of the Great Dao was mentioned above, but unfortunately the water of the Great Dao is very rare, unless it comes from the inheritance of the strong in the chaos, there is hope to get a little, I didn't expect you to have this kind of Great Dao Water in your hands!"

"Flame Heavenly Venerable, I wonder if I can trade a top-level treasure with you with this kind of Great Dao Water?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course you can!" Flame Heavenly Venerable hurriedly said: "However, you have diluted the water of the Great Dao countless times, so its value is limited, I need 3,000 catties to be able to trade it for you a top-grade treasure!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian immediately agreed.

For others, 3,000 catties of diluted Dao water is a lot, but for him it is very little.

Even if he used a lot of Dao water, he still kept a lot, and a mere 3,000 catties was nothing.

"So happy to agree?"

Agni Tianzun regretted it a little, he looked so happy, there must be a lot of water in the Great Dao on his body, maybe he wanted 10,000 catties, and the other party would agree.

However, now that he has said it, it will be a little bad for him to change his words again.

Of course, 3,000 catties of avenue water is enough to make up for the value of a top-level treasure, and it is more than enough, after all, how rare the avenue water is!

Moreover, 3,000 catties of Great Avenue Water is enough to make his body more suitable for the Great Avenue of Fire, and it is enough to exert more powerful power on the Great Avenue of Fire.

In this way, his combat power that has been staying for a long time will also be greatly improved!

I don't know how many Tianzun wanted to pay a huge price in order to improve a little strength, and even in the end there was no result.

And he only paid the price of a top-level treasure to greatly increase his strength, which is a good thing!

Therefore, he did not lose money at all in this transaction.

Soon, the two closed the deal.

Ye Tian got his wish and obtained a top-level treasure-Forbidden Sky Bead!
